description: Use this API to modify the zero sequence impedance data of one winding of an existing three- winding transformer in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Zero Sequence Transformer Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = seq_3_wind_winding_data(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, warg, realar)
python_syntax: ierr = seq_3_wind_winding_data(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, warg, realar)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of one of the buses. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number one of the other buses. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: kbus
parameters.description: Bus number of the third bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: warg
parameters.description: Winding number (1, 2 or 3). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying (defaulted data items are unchanged). (input).

error_codes.description: circuit identifier is more than two characters.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - None.
